latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
latest.script_key: the moon shows us one face for a reason watch the moon s position because its rotation and orbit are locked together it spins once in about the same time it circles earth so the same side keeps facing us that is synchronized motion not stillness which orbit clue next

latest.title: mountain creeks carve valleys faster than you think
latest.script_key: these little creeks are the real bulldozers watch the rocks split in real time they don t just flow over stone they snap it that s why every valley you see started as a crack like this ever stood in a dry creek bed you re walking on rock that used to be a mountain

latest.title: Alpine plants hide something in plain sight
